vision.heading: Vision
vision.body: This is an urgent restructuring of how life on Earth is organised, sustained, and shared...
vision.quote: Our vision is to reimagine and plant seeds to rebuild society around the principle that whatever we take, we must give back—through cycles that replenish, not destroy.

beliefs.title: 🌱 The Earth Is Precious:
beliefs.summary: This planet is a rare jewel in an unfathomably vast universe.
beliefs.details: Borders are artificial; life flows across them.

beliefs.title: ♻️ Use, Replenish, Restore:
beliefs.summary: Waste is failure. Degeneration is violence.
beliefs.details: Every system must replenish more than it extracts.
